Sprint Contract 已生成完毕。以下是规划摘要：

---

# 📋 Sprint Contract — 跳跳棋 (Chinese Checkers)

## 目标摘要
构建单文件自包含 HTML5 跳跳棋网页游戏 (`src/chinese_checkers.html`)，人 vs AI 对战，中文界面，零依赖，对齐 `snake.html` 先例。

## 子任务 (8 个)

| # | 子任务 | Agent | Token 预算 | 关键 DoD |
|---|--------|-------|-----------|----------|
| **ST-1** | 需求规格编写 | requirements-analyst | ≤80K | F001~Fxxx 全编号，AC 用 Given/When/Then，评审 ≥80 分 |
| **ST-2** | 系统设计 | system-architect | ≤120K | 坐标系方案确定、移动算法、AI 伪代码、状态机定义 |
| **ST-3** | 代码实现 | developer | ≤200K | 单文件 HTML，121 位棋盘，连续跳跃，AI 贪心策略 |
| **ST-4** | 代码评审 | code-reviewer | — | 设计-代码一致性，错误处理，评审 ≥80 分 |
| **ST-5** | 安全评审 | security-reviewer | — | 无 XSS/eval，无外部请求 |
| **ST-6** | 安全合规 | safety-reviewer | — | 标注 ISO 26262/AUTOSAR 不适用 |
| **ST-7** | QA 测试 | qa-engineer | ≤100K | 全功能覆盖，测试全通过 |
| **ST-8** | 交付 | delivery-manager | — | Git commit + Gerrit push |

## 关键路径
```
ST-1 → ST-2 → ST-3 → ST-4/ST-5/ST-6 → ST-7 → ST-8
```

## 🔴 需人工确认的节点
- **R1**: 原始 spec 仅"跳跳棋"三字，已推断为标准六角星 2 人对战模式。若用户有不同预期（如西洋跳棋、多人模式等），需在需求阶段前确认。

## 产出物
完整 sprint contract 已写入：
`/runs/task-20260409194003-2e64ec/planning/sprint_contract.md`

**预算**：预估 ~225K / 500K tokens (45%)，时间 ~120 min，均有充足余量。

1	name: Harness Control Plane
2	version: 2.0.0
3	description: Feishu -> Claude Code CLI -> Review -> QA -> Gerrit 的长运行 harness 编排配置
4	stages:
5	- id: intake
6	  name: Request Intake
7	  agent: planner
8	- id: planning
9	  name: Sprint Planning
10	  agent: planner
11	- id: requirements
12	  name: Requirements
13	  agent: requirements-analyst
14	- id: design
15	  name: System Design
16	  agent: system-architect
17	- id: development
18	  name: Implementation
19	  agent: developer
20	- id: code_review
21	  name: Code Review
22	  agent: code-reviewer
23	- id: security_review
24	  name: Security Review
25	  agent: security-reviewer
26	- id: safety_review
27	  name: Safety Review
28	  agent: safety-reviewer
29	- id: testing
30	  name: QA Testing
31	  agent: qa-engineer
32	- id: delivery
33	  name: Gerrit Delivery
34	  agent: delivery-manager
35	- id: build_verification
36	  name: Build Verification
37	  agent: build-verifier
38	loop_control:
39	  poll_interval_seconds: 2
40	  max_parallel_tasks: 1
41	  allow_resume_after_restart: true
42	human_intervention_rules:
43	  force_pause:
44	  - condition: 需求包含安全、权限、支付、生产变更
45	    pause_stage: design
46	    message: 高风险需求，需要人工确认后继续
47	  - condition: review 或 testing 明确返回 NEED_HUMAN
48	    pause_stage: '*'
49	    message: 模型要求人工介入
50	  - condition: 阶段重试耗尽
51	    pause_stage: '*'
52	    message: 自动恢复失败，需要人工接管
53	observability:
54	  sse_endpoint: /api/stream
55	  runtime_endpoint: /api/runtime
56	  keep_latest_events: 200
57	  keep_task_history: 20
58	integrations:
59	  feishu:
60	    webhook_endpoint: /api/feishu/webhook
61	    notify_on:
62	    - task_completed
63	    - task_failed
64	    - approval_required
65	  gerrit:
66	    strategy: push refs/for/<branch>%topic=<task_id>
67	  claude_code_cli:
68	    output_format: stream-json
69	    expected_verdicts:
70	    - PASS
71	    - FAIL
72	    - NEED_HUMAN
73	  hil:
74	    status: reserved_stub
75	  build_verification:
76	    status: reserved_stub
77

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	set -euo pipefail
3	
4	DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
5	VENV="$DIR/.venv"
6	PORT="${1:-8080}"
7	
8	# 加载 Claude Code CLI 环境（代理 + 认证）
9	CLAUDE_ENV="/Users/xing/cc-haha/claude-global-env.sh"
10	if [ -f "$CLAUDE_ENV" ]; then
11	    echo "Loading Claude Code environment..."
12	    source "$CLAUDE_ENV"
13	fi
14	
15	# 确保虚拟环境存在
16	if [ ! -d "$VENV" ]; then
17	    echo "Creating virtualenv..."
18	    python3 -m venv "$VENV"
19	fi
20	
21	# 安装依赖
22	"$VENV/bin/pip" install -q -r "$DIR/requirements/runtime.txt"
23	
24	# 杀掉残留进程
25	lsof -ti:"$PORT" | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
26	
27	echo "Starting Harness on http://localhost:$PORT"
28	exec "$VENV/bin/python3" "$DIR/engine/pipeline_runner.py" --harness-dir "$DIR" --web-port "$PORT"
29

1	# ============================================================
2	# 预算与资源控制配置
3	# ============================================================
4	
5	budget:
6	  # 每个 Feature 的 Token 限制
7	  max_tokens_per_feature: 500000
8	  
9	  # 单个阶段的 Token 限制
10	  max_tokens_per_stage:
11	    requirements: 80000
12	    design: 120000
13	    development: 200000
14	    testing: 100000
15	  
16	  # 重试预算
17	  max_retries_per_stage: 3
18	  max_total_retries: 10
19	  
20	  # 时间预算
21	  max_time_per_feature_minutes: 120
22	  max_time_per_stage_minutes:
23	    requirements: 10
24	    design: 20
25	    development: 60
26	    testing: 30
27	
28	  # 预算告警阈值
29	  alert_threshold_percent: 80    # 使用超过 80% 发出警告
30	  hard_stop_threshold_percent: 95 # 使用超过 95% 强制暂停
31	
32	# 成本参考（按实际模型定价调整）
33	cost_reference:
34	  model: "gpt-4 / claude-3.5-sonnet"
35	  input_per_1k_tokens: 0.003    # USD
36	  output_per_1k_tokens: 0.015   # USD
37	  estimated_cost_per_feature: 1.5  # USD
38	
39	# 预算耗尽时的行为
40	on_budget_exceeded: "pause_and_notify"
41	on_time_exceeded: "save_progress_and_pause"
42	
43	# --------------------------------------------------
44	# 上下文管理策略
45	# --------------------------------------------------
46	context_management:
47	  # 上下文蒸馏阈值：产物超过此大小触发自动摘要
48	  distill_threshold_chars: 10000
49	  
50	  # 摘要保留比例
51	  summary_retention_ratio: 0.3
52	
53	  # 不可压缩的关键段落标记
54	  protected_section_markers:
55	    - 安全约束
56	    - 接口定义
57	    - 数据模型
58	    - API
59	    - schema
60	    - ISO 26262
61	    - AUTOSAR
62	  
63	  # 传递给下一阶段的内容
64	  handoff_content:
65	    - 关键决策列表（decisions.md）
66	    - 接口契约摘要（api_summary.md）
67	    - 变更 diff
68	    - 上一阶段质量评分
69	    - 未解决争议列表
70

1	# ============================================================
2	# Agent 角色定义
3	# 每个 Agent 的职责、输入/输出、Prompt 模板
4	# ============================================================
5	
6	agents:
7	
8	  # --------------------------------------------------
9	  # 需求分析专家
10	  # --------------------------------------------------
11	  - id: requirements-analyst
12	    name: 需求分析专家
13	    role_type: analyst
14	    description: 接收功能规范，输出详细需求规格说明书
15	
16	    capabilities:
17	      - 功能点识别与分类
18	      - 用户故事编写
19	      - 验收标准定义
20	      - 非功能需求量化
21	      - 优先级排序
22	
23	    input_format: |
24	      ## 输入
25	      功能规范文档 (Markdown)
26	
27	    output_format: |
28	      ## 输出格式要求
29	      # 需求规格说明书 - {项目名}
30	
31	      ## 1. 项目概述
32	      - 项目背景、目标、范围
33	
34	      ## 2. 功能需求
35	      ### F001: {功能名}
36	      - **描述**: ...
37	      - **优先级**: P0/P1/P2/P3
38	      - **验收标准(AC)**:
39	        - Given ... When ... Then ...
40	
41	      ## 3. 非功能需求
42	      - 性能: {具体指标}
43	      - 安全: {具体要求}
44	      - 兼容性: ...
45	
46	      ## 4. 用户故事
47	      - As a ..., I want ..., So that ...
48	
49	      ## 5. 约束与假设
50	
51	    prompt_template: |
52	      你是一位资深的软件需求分析师，擅长将模糊的功能描述转化为精确的需求规格。
53	
54	      请分析以下功能规范，输出符合格式要求的《需求规格说明书》。
55	
56	      ## 功能规范
57	      {spec_content}
58	
59	      ## 要求
60	      1. 每个功能点必须有唯一编号（F001, F002...）
61	      2. 验收标准使用 Given/When/Then 格式
62	      3. 非功能需求必须量化（不能说"快速"，要说"< 500ms"）
63	      4. 功能按 P0~P3 分级
64	      5. 考虑边界条件和异常流程
65	
66	      直接输出 Markdown 格式，不要输出思考过程。
67	
68	    validation_rules:
69	      - 每个功能点有 Fxxx 编号
70	      - 每个 Fxxx 有至少一条 AC
71	      - 不包含模糊描述词
72	      - 非功能需求有数值指标
73	
74	  # --------------------------------------------------
75	  # 系统架构师
76	  # --------------------------------------------------
77	  - id: system-architect
78	    name: 系统架构师
79	    role_type: architect
80	    description: 基于需求规格进行系统设计和架构规划
81	
82	    capabilities:
83	      - 架构模式选择与分层设计
84	      - API 接口设计（REST/GraphQL/gRPC）
85	      - 数据模型设计（ER 图）
86	      - 技术选型与风险评估
87	      - C4 架构图绘制
88	
89	    input_format: 需求规格说明书 (Markdown)
90	
91	    output_format: |
92	      ## 输出
93	      1. design/architecture.md  - 系统架构设计
94	      2. design/api_design.md    - API 接口设计
95	      3. design/data_model.md    - 数据模型设计
96	
97	    prompt_template: |
98	      你是一位资深系统架构师，擅长将需求转化为可实施的技术方案。
99	
100	      请基于以下需求规格，输出系统设计文档。
101	
102	      ## 需求规格
103	      {requirements_content}
104	
105	      ## 要求
106	      1. 架构文档需包含：系统上下文图、容器图、组件图（C4 模型）
107	      2. API 设计需包含：每个接口的 URL、Method、Request Body、Response、错误码
108	      3. 数据模型需包含：ER 图（用 Mermaid 语法）、每个实体的字段定义
109	      4. 每个设计决策必须标注来源需求编号（如 [REQ-F001]）
110	      5. 说明技术选型理由和已知风险
111	
112	      直接输出三个独立的 Markdown 文件内容。
113	
114	    validation_rules:
115	      - 包含架构图（Mermaid 或文本）
116	      - 每个 API 有完整的 Request/Response 定义
117	      - 每个设计决策有需求追溯编号
118	      - 数据模型包含字段类型
119	
120	  # --------------------------------------------------
121	  # 开发工程师
122	  # --------------------------------------------------
123	  - id: developer
124	    name: 开发工程师
125	    role_type: developer
126	    description: 根据设计文档编写代码实现
127	
128	    capabilities:
129	      - 业务逻辑实现
130	      - 单元测试编写
131	      - 代码规范遵守
132	      - 技术债务控制
133	
134	    input_format: |
135	      设计文档 (architecture.md + api_design.md + data_model.md)
136	
137	    output_format: |
138	      ## 输出
139	      src/ 目录下的完整源码
140	
141	    prompt_template: |
142	      你是一位经验丰富的全栈开发工程师。
143	
144	      请根据以下设计文档实现代码。
145	
146	      ## 架构设计
147	      {architecture_content}
148	
149	      ## API 设计
150	      {api_design_content}
151	
152	      ## 数据模型
153	      {data_model_content}
154	
155	      ## 要求
156	      1. 严格遵循设计文档的架构分层
157	      2. API 路径、参数名、数据结构与设计文档完全一致
158	      3. 核心业务逻辑必须有单元测试（覆盖率 ≥ 80%）
159	      4. 关键函数添加注释，解释设计意图
160	      5. 异常处理要完善，错误码与设计文档一致
161	
162	    validation_rules:
163	      - 代码编译/运行无错误
164	      - API 路径与设计文档一致
165	      - 核心模块有单元测试
166	      - 通过 Lint 检查
167	
168	  # --------------------------------------------------
169	  # 测试工程师
170	  # --------------------------------------------------
171	  - id: qa-engineer
172	    name: 测试工程师
173	    role_type: tester
174	    description: 编写测试用例，执行测试，输出测试报告
175	
176	    capabilities:
177	      - 测试用例设计（等价类、边界值、场景法）
178	      - 自动化测试脚本编写
179	      - 测试报告撰写
180	      - 缺陷分析与分级
181	
182	    input_format: |
183	      源码 + 需求规格说明书
184	
185	    output_format: |
186	      ## 输出
187	      1. tests/cases/        - 测试用例文件
188	      2. tests/reports/test_report.md - 测试报告
189	
190	    prompt_template: |
191	      你是一位严谨的测试工程师。
192	
193	      请基于以下需求规格和源码，设计测试用例并编写测试报告。
194	
195	      ## 需求规格
196	      {requirements_content}
197	
198	      ## 要求
199	      1. 每个需求功能点（F001~Fxxx）至少有一个测试用例
200	      2. 每个功能覆盖：正常流程（Happy Path）、异常流程（Sad Path）、边界条件
201	      3. 用例格式：TC-xxx | 前置条件 | 测试步骤 | 预期结果 | 优先级
202	      4. P0 功能的用例必须标记为 P0
203	      5. 测试报告包含：执行摘要、通过率统计、缺陷列表、风险评估
204	
205	    validation_rules:
206	      - 每个需求功能点有对应用例
207	      - 用例包含完整的前置条件/步骤/预期结果
208	      - 测试报告有统计数据
209	      - P0 用例全部执行并有结果
210	
211	  # --------------------------------------------------
212	  # 独立评审 Agent
213	  # --------------------------------------------------
214	  - id: review-agent
215	    name: 评审 Agent
216	    role_type: reviewer
217	    description: 独立评审各阶段产物质量，不参与产出
218	
219	    capabilities:
220	      - 需求文档评审（完整性、无歧义性）
221	      - 设计文档评审（一致性、可行性）
222	      - 代码评审（规范、可维护性）
223	      - 跨阶段一致性检查
224	
225	    prompt_template: |
226	      你是一位独立的质量评审专家。你的职责是客观评审产物，不参与产出。
227	
228	      ## 评审目标
229	      阶段: {stage}
230	      产物: {artifact_path}
231	
232	      ## 评审标准（来自 review_protocol.yaml）
233	      {criteria}
234	
235	      ## 任务
236	      1. 逐条检查评审标准
237	      2. 给每条标准打分（0-100）
238	      3. 加权计算总分
239	      4. 列出具体问题和改进建议
240	      5. 给出通过/不通过判定
241	
242	      ## 输出格式
243	      ```json
244	      {
245	        "stage": "{stage}",
246	        "total_score": 85,
247	        "pass": true,
248	        "criteria_scores": [
249	          {"id": "REQ-C01", "score": 90, "feedback": "..."},
250	          ...
251	        ],
252	        "issues": [
253	          {"severity": "warning", "description": "...", "suggestion": "..."},
254	          ...
255	        ],
256	        "cross_stage_issues": [...]
257	      }
258	      ```
259	
260	    validation_rules:
261	      - 评审结果必须包含总分和判定
262	      - 每条标准有独立评分和反馈
263	      - 交叉检查结果单独列出
264	
265	  - id: planner
266	    name: 规划器
267	    role_type: planner
268	    description: 将请求拆解为 sprint contract、子任务和质量门禁
269	
270	    prompt_template: |
271	      你是一位多智能体研发流水线的 Planner。
272	
273	      请基于用户请求输出：
274	      1. 目标摘要
275	      2. 子任务列表
276	      3. 依赖关系
277	      4. Definition of Done
278	      5. 风险点和需要人工确认的节点
279	
280	      最终输出为 Markdown。
281	
282	  - id: code-reviewer
283	    name: 代码评审员
284	    role_type: reviewer
285	    description: 独立进行代码质量评审，只审不改
286	
287	    prompt_template: |
288	      你是一位严格的代码评审员。
289	
290	      请针对实现结果输出：
291	      1. 主要问题
292	      2. 风险等级
293	      3. 是否通过
294	
295	      必须以以下结尾之一结束：
296	      VERDICT: PASS
297	      VERDICT: FAIL
298	      VERDICT: NEED_HUMAN
299	
300	  - id: security-reviewer
301	    name: 安全评审员
302	    role_type: security-reviewer
303	    description: 独立检查权限、敏感信息、注入风险和副作用
304	
305	    prompt_template: |
306	      你是一位偏审计风格的安全评审员。
307	
308	      检查认证授权、敏感信息、命令执行、注入风险、数据删除和生产风险。
309	      必须给出明确结论，并以以下结尾之一结束：
310	      VERDICT: PASS
311	      VERDICT: FAIL
312	      VERDICT: NEED_HUMAN
313	
314	  - id: debugger
315	    name: 调试修复员
316	    role_type: debugger
317	    description: 在 review 或 QA 失败后进行最小范围修复
318	
319	    prompt_template: |
320	      你是一位最小化修复导向的 Debugger。
321	
322	      仅针对失败报告中的明确问题给出修复计划，不做额外重构。
323	      输出修复范围、受影响文件、回归验证建议。
324	      结束时输出：VERDICT: PASS
325	
326	  - id: delivery-manager
327	    name: 交付管理器
328	    role_type: delivery
329	    description: 负责 Gerrit 提交和外部通知
330	
331	    prompt_template: |

333	
334	      请总结：
335	      1. 当前变更是否满足交付条件
336	      2. Gerrit 提交建议
337	      3. 对飞书用户的状态通知内容

1	# ============================================================
2	# 产物评审协议（Artifact Review Protocol）
3	# 独立于产出者之外的评审规则
4	# ============================================================
5	
6	# 通用评审配置
7	default_review:
8	  pass_threshold: 80           # 0-100 分，低于此分打回重做
9	  auto_repair: true            # 是否允许评审 Agent 自动修复小问题
10	  max_auto_repairs: 2          # 最大自动修复次数
11	
12	# --------------------------------------------------
13	# 各阶段评审标准
14	# --------------------------------------------------
15	stage_reviews:
16	
17	  requirements:
18	    reviewer: review-agent
19	    description: "评审需求规格说明书的质量"
20	    criteria:
21	      # P0 - 必须满足
22	      - id: REQ-C01
23	        name: 功能完整性
24	        description: "所有功能点均已识别并记录"
25	        weight: 25
26	        check: "每个功能点有独立编号（F001, F002...）"
27	      - id: REQ-C02
28	        name: 验收标准
29	        description: "每个功能点有明确的验收标准"
30	        weight: 25
31	        check: "AC 以 Given/When/Then 格式编写"
32	      - id: REQ-C03
33	        name: 无歧义性
34	        description: "不存在模糊描述词"
35	        weight: 20
36	        check: "不包含 '可能/也许/大概/合适' 等词"
37	      - id: REQ-C04
38	        name: 非功能需求
39	        description: "非功能需求已量化"
40	        weight: 15
41	        check: "性能指标包含具体数值（如 响应 < 500ms）"
42	      - id: REQ-C05
43	        name: 优先级分类
44	        description: "功能点优先级明确"
45	        weight: 15
46	        check: "每个功能标注 P0/P1/P2/P3"
47	
48	  design:
49	    reviewer: review-agent
50	    description: "评审设计文档的质量"
51	    criteria:
52	      - id: DES-C01
53	        name: 架构清晰度
54	        description: "系统架构分层清晰，组件职责明确"
55	        weight: 20
56	        check: "包含架构图（C4 或类似格式）"
57	      - id: DES-C02
58	        name: 接口定义完整
59	        description: "所有 API 接口已定义"
60	        weight: 25
61	        check: "每个接口有 Request/Response 格式 + 错误码"
62	      - id: DES-C03
63	        name: 需求追溯性
64	        description: "设计决策可追溯到需求"
65	        weight: 20
66	        check: "每个设计决策标注对应的 REQ-xxx 编号"
67	      - id: DES-C04
68	        name: 数据模型完整
69	        description: "实体关系和字段定义完整"
70	        weight: 20
71	        check: "包含 ER 图和字段类型定义"
72	      - id: DES-C05
73	        name: 技术可行性
74	        description: "技术选型合理，无已知死胡同"
75	        weight: 15
76	        check: "关键技术有风险评估"
77	
78	  development:
79	    reviewer: review-agent
80	    description: "评审代码实现质量"
81	    criteria:
82	      - id: DEV-C01
83	        name: 代码规范
84	        description: "代码风格统一，符合项目规范"
85	        weight: 15
86	        check: "通过 Lint 检查（0 error）"
87	      - id: DEV-C02
88	        name: 设计一致性
89	        description: "代码实现与设计文档一致"
90	        weight: 30
91	        check: "API 路径、数据结构、命名与设计文档对齐"
92	      - id: DEV-C03
93	        name: 错误处理
94	        description: "异常和边界情况有合理处理"
95	        weight: 20
96	        check: "关键路径有 try-catch / 错误码返回"
97	      - id: DEV-C04
98	        name: 单元测试
99	        description: "关键逻辑有单元测试覆盖"
100	        weight: 20
101	        check: "核心模块测试覆盖率 ≥ 80%"
102	      - id: DEV-C05
103	        name: 可维护性
104	        description: "代码结构清晰，有必要的注释"
105	        weight: 15
106	        check: "复杂函数有注释，模块职责单一"
107	
108	  testing:
109	    reviewer: review-agent
110	    description: "评审测试覆盖度和质量"
111	    criteria:
112	      - id: TST-C01
113	        name: 需求覆盖
114	        description: "所有需求功能点都有对应测试用例"
115	        weight: 30
116	        check: "F001~Fxxx 每个功能至少一个测试用例"
117	      - id: TST-C02
118	        name: 场景覆盖
119	        description: "覆盖正常流程、异常流程、边界条件"
120	        weight: 25
121	        check: "每个功能至少有 happy/sad/boundary 三种用例"
122	      - id: TST-C03
123	        name: 用例质量
124	        description: "测试步骤清晰，预期结果明确"
125	        weight: 20
126	        check: "用例包含 前置条件/步骤/预期结果"
127	      - id: TST-C04
128	        name: 数据驱动
129	        description: "使用参数化测试覆盖多场景"
130	        weight: 15
131	        check: "等价类/边界值有数据驱动用例"
132	      - id: TST-C05
133	        name: 自动化可行
134	        description: "用例描述足够具体，可转化为自动化脚本"
135	        weight: 10
136	        check: "测试步骤可直接映射为代码操作"
137	
138	  safety_review:
139	    reviewer: review-agent
140	    description: "评审车载功能安全、网络安全与合规风险"
141	    criteria:
142	      - id: SAF-C01
143	        name: ISO 26262 影响评估
144	        description: "需求与设计是否识别功能安全影响与危害"
145	        weight: 25
146	        check: "明确 HARA / ASIL 影响或说明不适用"
147	      - id: SAF-C02
148	        name: AUTOSAR 一致性
149	        description: "接口、组件边界与 AUTOSAR/域控架构兼容"
150	        weight: 20
151	        check: "说明与 Classic/Adaptive AUTOSAR 的契合点或偏差"
152	      - id: SAF-C03
153	        name: OTA 回滚安全
154	        description: "升级失败时有安全回滚与状态恢复策略"
155	        weight: 20
156	        check: "设计中包含回滚、降级或 fail-safe 说明"
157	      - id: SAF-C04
158	        name: UNECE WP.29 / ISO 21434
159	        description: "网络安全威胁与供应链要求被显式考虑"
160	        weight: 20
161	        check: "列出关键威胁面、鉴权、日志与供应链控制"
162	      - id: SAF-C05
163	        name: HIL / 车端验证准备度
164	        description: "需求和设计是否为后续台架或实车验证预留接口"
165	        weight: 15
166	        check: "说明 CAN/LIN/HIL/仿真所需注入点和观测点"
167	
168	# --------------------------------------------------
169	# 一致性交叉检查（跨阶段）
170	# --------------------------------------------------
171	cross_stage_checks:
172	  - name: 需求-设计一致性
173	    source: requirements/requirements_spec.md
174	    target: design/
175	    checks:
176	      - "设计中的每个功能模块都能追溯到需求编号"
177	      - "设计中没有超出需求范围的功能"
178	      - "需求中的非功能指标在设计中有对应方案"
179	
180	  - name: 设计-代码一致性
181	    source: design/
182	    target: src/
183	    checks:
184	      - "API 路径与设计文档完全一致"
185	      - "数据模型字段与 ER 图一致"
186	      - "架构分层与设计文档一致"
187	
188	  - name: 需求-测试一致性
189	    source: requirements/requirements_spec.md
190	    target: tests/
191	    checks:
192	      - "每个需求功能点至少有一个测试用例"
193	      - "测试用例的验收标准与需求 AC 一致"
194	      - "P0 需求的测试用例有 P0 标记"

1	"""
2	Harness 核心引擎 - 状态机与循环驱动
3	Pipeline State Machine & Loop Driver
4	
5	定义流水线状态转移、无限循环机制、重试逻辑、人工介入处理
6	"""
7	
8	from enum import Enum
9	from dataclasses import dataclass, field
10	from datetime import datetime
11	from typing import Optional
12	import json
13	import os
14	
15	from state_store import StateStore
16	
17	
18	# ============================================================
19	# 状态定义
20	# ============================================================
21	class PipelineState(Enum):
22	    """流水线状态枚举"""
23	    IDLE = "idle"                 # 等待新功能规范
24	    REQUIREMENTS = "requirements"  # 需求分析中
25	    DESIGN = "design"             # 系统设计中
26	    DEVELOPMENT = "development"    # 代码开发中
27	    TESTING = "testing"           # 质量测试中
28	    REVIEWING = "reviewing"       # 产物评审中
29	    HUMAN_INTERVENTION = "human_intervention"  # 等待人工介入
30	    DONE = "done"                 # 本轮完成
31	
32	
33	class ReviewResult(Enum):
34	    """评审结果"""
35	    PASS = "pass"
36	    FAIL = "fail"
37	    NEED_HUMAN = "need_human"     # 需要人工介入
38	
39	
40	class FeedbackAction(Enum):
41	    """反馈回流动作"""
42	    CONTINUE = "continue"          # 进入下一阶段
43	    RETRY_CURRENT = "retry"        # 重试当前阶段
44	    REWORK_PREVIOUS = "rework"     # 退回上一阶段
45	    PAUSE_FOR_HUMAN = "pause"      # 暂停等人工
46	    SKIP_TO_DONE = "done"          # 跳到完成（所有测试通过）
47	
48	
49	# ============================================================
50	# 状态转移表
51	# ============================================================
52	TRANSITIONS = {
53	    PipelineState.IDLE: {
54	        "new_spec": PipelineState.REQUIREMENTS,
55	    },
56	    PipelineState.REQUIREMENTS: {
57	        "review_pass": PipelineState.DESIGN,
58	        "review_fail": PipelineState.REQUIREMENTS,  # 重试
59	        "human_needed": PipelineState.HUMAN_INTERVENTION,
60	    },
61	    PipelineState.DESIGN: {
62	        "review_pass": PipelineState.DEVELOPMENT,
63	        "review_fail": PipelineState.DESIGN,
64	        "inconsistent_with_req": PipelineState.REQUIREMENTS,  # 回流到需求
65	        "human_needed": PipelineState.HUMAN_INTERVENTION,
66	    },
67	    PipelineState.DEVELOPMENT: {
68	        "review_pass": PipelineState.TESTING,
69	        "review_fail": PipelineState.DEVELOPMENT,
70	        "inconsistent_with_design": PipelineState.DESIGN,  # 回流到设计
71	        "human_needed": PipelineState.HUMAN_INTERVENTION,
72	    },
73	    PipelineState.TESTING: {
74	        "all_pass": PipelineState.DONE,
75	        "has_bugs": PipelineState.DEVELOPMENT,  # Bug 退回开发
76	        "req_issue": PipelineState.REQUIREMENTS,  # 需求问题退回
77	        "human_needed": PipelineState.HUMAN_INTERVENTION,
78	    },
79	    PipelineState.DONE: {
80	        "next_spec": PipelineState.IDLE,  # 回到等待
81	        "shutdown": PipelineState.IDLE,
82	    },
83	    PipelineState.HUMAN_INTERVENTION: {
84	        "resume": PipelineState.REQUIREMENTS,  # 人工处理后重新开始
85	        "skip": PipelineState.IDLE,
86	    },
87	}
88	
89	
90	# ============================================================
91	# 数据类
92	# ============================================================
93	@dataclass
94	class StageMetrics:
95	    """阶段执行指标"""
96	    start_time: Optional[datetime] = None
97	    end_time: Optional[datetime] = None
98	    token_usage: int = 0
99	    retry_count: int = 0
100	    review_score: Optional[float] = None
101	    review_passed: bool = False
102	    status: str = "pending"  # pending / running / review / passed / failed
103	
104	
105	@dataclass
106	class ArtifactVersion:
107	    """产物版本"""
108	    version: int
109	    path: str
110	    created_at: str
111	    size_bytes: int
112	    review_score: Optional[float] = None
113	    changelog: str = ""
114	
115	
116	@dataclass
117	class ChangeRequest:
118	    """变更请求"""
119	    change_id: str
120	    description: str
121	    affected_requirements: list = field(default_factory=list)
122	    affected_designs: list = field(default_factory=list)
123	    affected_code_modules: list = field(default_factory=list)
124	    affected_test_cases: list = field(default_factory=list)
125	    status: str = "pending"  # pending / analyzed / applied
126	
127	
128	@dataclass
129	class Alert:
130	    """告警"""
131	    timestamp: str
132	    level: str        # info / warning / error / critical
133	    stage: str
134	    message: str
135	    action_required: bool = False
136	    resolved: bool = False
137	
138	
139	# ============================================================
140	# 流水线状态快照（持久化用）
141	# ============================================================
142	@dataclass
143	class PipelineSnapshot:
144	    """完整的流水线状态快照"""
145	    current_state: str = PipelineState.IDLE.value
146	    current_spec: Optional[str] = None
147	    iteration: int = 0
148	    total_iterations: int = 0
149	
150	    # 各阶段指标
151	    stage_metrics: dict = field(default_factory=dict)
152	
153	    # 产物版本历史
154	    artifact_versions: dict = field(default_factory=dict)
155	
156	    # 变更记录
157	    change_requests: list = field(default_factory=list)
158	
159	    # 告警记录
160	    alerts: list = field(default_factory=list)
161	
162	    # 预算追踪
163	    total_tokens_used: int = 0
164	    budget_limit: int = 500000
165	    total_time_seconds: float = 0
166	
167	    # 活动日志（最近 100 条）
168	    activity_log: list = field(default_factory=list)
169	
170	    # 错误追踪
171	    errors: list = field(default_factory=list)
172	
173	    # 评审历史
174	    review_history: list = field(default_factory=list)
175	
176	    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
177	        """序列化为字典"""
178	        return {
179	            "current_state": self.current_state,
180	            "current_spec": self.current_spec,
181	            "iteration": self.iteration,
182	            "total_iterations": self.total_iterations,
183	            "stage_metrics": {
184	                k: {
185	                    "start_time": v.start_time.isoformat() if v.start_time else None,
186	                    "end_time": v.end_time.isoformat() if v.end_time else None,
187	                    "token_usage": v.token_usage,
188	                    "retry_count": v.retry_count,
189	                    "review_score": v.review_score,
190	                    "review_passed": v.review_passed,
191	                    "status": v.status,
192	                }
193	                for k, v in self.stage_metrics.items()
194	            },
195	            "artifact_versions": self.artifact_versions,
196	            "alerts": [
197	                {"timestamp": a.timestamp, "level": a.level,
198	                 "stage": a.stage, "message": a.message,
199	                 "action_required": a.action_required,
200	                 "resolved": a.resolved}
201	                for a in self.alerts
202	            ],
203	            "total_tokens_used": self.total_tokens_used,
204	            "budget_limit": self.budget_limit,
205	            "total_time_seconds": self.total_time_seconds,
206	            "activity_log": self.activity_log[-100:],
207	            "review_history": self.review_history[-50:],
208	            "errors": self.errors[-50:],
209	        }
210	
211	    def to_json(self) -> str:
212	        return json.dumps(self.to_dict(), indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
213	
214	    @classmethod
215	    def from_dict(cls, data: dict) -> "PipelineSnapshot":
216	        """从字典反序列化"""
217	        snap = cls()
218	        snap.current_state = data.get("current_state", PipelineState.IDLE.value)
219	        snap.current_spec = data.get("current_spec")
220	        snap.iteration = data.get("iteration", 0)
221	        snap.total_iterations = data.get("total_iterations", 0)
222	        snap.total_tokens_used = data.get("total_tokens_used", 0)
223	        snap.budget_limit = data.get("budget_limit", 500000)
224	        snap.total_time_seconds = data.get("total_time_seconds", 0)
225	        snap.alerts = [Alert(**a) for a in data.get("alerts", [])]
226	        snap.activity_log = data.get("activity_log", [])
227	        snap.review_history = data.get("review_history", [])
228	        snap.errors = data.get("errors", [])
229	
230	        for k, v in data.get("stage_metrics", {}).items():
231	            m = StageMetrics()
232	            m.start_time = datetime.fromisoformat(v["start_time"]) if v.get("start_time") else None
233	            m.end_time = datetime.fromisoformat(v["end_time"]) if v.get("end_time") else None
234	            m.token_usage = v.get("token_usage", 0)
235	            m.retry_count = v.get("retry_count", 0)
236	            m.review_score = v.get("review_score")
237	            m.review_passed = v.get("review_passed", False)
238	            m.status = v.get("status", "pending")
239	            snap.stage_metrics[k] = m
240	
241	        snap.artifact_versions = data.get("artifact_versions", {})
242	        return snap
243

245	# ============================================================
246	# 流水线引擎
247	# ============================================================
248	class PipelineEngine:
249	    """
250	    流水线状态机引擎
251	
252	    核心职责：
253	    1. 管理状态转移
254	    2. 驱动无限主循环
255	    3. 管理阶段重试
256	    4. 处理反馈回流
257	    5. 持久化状态快照
258	    6. 管理告警和人工介入
259	    """
260	
261	    def __init__(self, harness_dir: str, budget_limit: int = 500000,
262	                 log_storage=None):
263	        self.harness_dir = harness_dir
264	        self.state_store = StateStore(harness_dir)
265	        self.state_file = os.path.join(harness_dir, "data", "pipeline_state.json")
266	        self.specs_pending_dir = os.path.join(harness_dir, "specs", "pending")
267	        self.specs_processed_dir = os.path.join(harness_dir, "specs", "processed")
268	
269	        # 初始化或恢复状态
270	        self.snapshot = self._load_state()
271	        self.snapshot.budget_limit = budget_limit
272	
273	        # 日志存储（外部注入，可选）
274	        self.log_storage = log_storage
275	
276	        # 循环控制参数
277	        self.poll_interval = 10        # 秒
278	        self.max_retries_per_stage = 3
279	        self.max_iterations_per_spec = 5
280	
281	    # --------------------------------------------------
282	    # 状态持久化
283	    # --------------------------------------------------
284	    def _load_state(self) -> PipelineSnapshot:
285	        """从文件加载状态"""
286	        data = self.state_store.load_document("pipeline_state")
287	        if data is not None:
288	            return PipelineSnapshot.from_dict(data)
289	        if os.path.exists(self.state_file):
290	            with open(self.state_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
291	                data = json.load(f)
292	                return PipelineSnapshot.from_dict(data)
293	        return PipelineSnapshot()
294	
295	    def _save_state(self):
296	        """保存状态到文件"""
297	        payload = self.snapshot.to_dict()
298	        self.state_store.save_document("pipeline_state", payload)
299	        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(self.state_file), exist_ok=True)
300	        with open(self.state_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
301	            f.write(json.dumps(payload, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))
302	
303	    # --------------------------------------------------
304	    # 状态转移
305	    # --------------------------------------------------
306	    def transition(self, trigger: str) -> Optional[PipelineState]:
307	        """执行状态转移"""
308	        current = PipelineState(self.snapshot.current_state)
309	        transitions = TRANSITIONS.get(current, {})
310	
311	        if trigger in transitions:
312	            new_state = transitions[trigger]
313	            old_state_name = current.value
314	            new_state_name = new_state.value
315	
316	            self._log_activity(
317	                f"状态转移: {old_state_name} → {new_state_name} (触发: {trigger})"
318	            )
319	
320	            self.snapshot.current_state = new_state.value
321	            self._save_state()
322	            return new_state
323	
324	        self._log_error(f"无效的状态转移: {current.value} + {trigger}")
325	        return None
326	
327	    # --------------------------------------------------
328	    # 日志与告警
329	    # --------------------------------------------------
330	    def _log_activity(self, message: str, stage: str = None):
331	        """记录活动日志（同时写入内存和文件存储）"""
332	        entry = {
333	            "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
334	            "message": message,
335	        }
336	        self.snapshot.activity_log.append(entry)
337	
338	        # 写入 append-only 日志存储
339	        if self.log_storage:
340	            try:
341	                level = "info"
342	                if "❌" in message or "失败" in message:
343	                    level = "error"
344	                elif "✅" in message or "通过" in message or "完成" in message:
345	                    level = "success"
346	                elif "⚠️" in message or "警告" in message:
347	                    level = "warning"
348	                self.log_storage.append_log(
349	                    level=level,
350	                    category="activity",
351	                    message=message,
352	                    stage=stage,
353	                    iteration=self.snapshot.iteration,
354	                    spec=self.snapshot.current_spec,
355	                )
356	            except Exception:
357	                pass  # 日志写入失败不影响主流程
358	
359	        self._save_state()
360	
361	    def _log_error(self, message: str, stage: str = None):
362	        """记录错误（同时写入内存和文件存储）"""
363	        entry = {
364	            "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
365	            "message": message,
366	        }
367	        self.snapshot.errors.append(entry)
368	
369	        # 写入 append-only 日志存储
370	        if self.log_storage:
371	            try:
372	                self.log_storage.append_log(
373	                    level="error",
374	                    category="error",
375	                    message=message,
376	                    stage=stage,
377	                    iteration=self.snapshot.iteration,
378	                    spec=self.snapshot.current_spec,
379	                )
380	            except Exception:
381	                pass
382	
383	        self._log_activity(f"❌ {message}")
384	
385	    def add_alert(self, level: str, stage: str, message: str,
386	                  action_required: bool = False):
387	        """添加告警（同时写入内存和文件存储）"""
388	        alert = Alert(
389	            timestamp=datetime.now().isoformat(),
390	            level=level,
391	            stage=stage,
392	            message=message,
393	            action_required=action_required,
394	        )
395	        self.snapshot.alerts.append(alert)
396	
397	        # 写入 append-only 日志存储
398	        if self.log_storage:
399	            try:
400	                self.log_storage.append_log(
401	                    level=level,
402	                    category="alert",
403	                    message=f"[{stage}] {message}",
404	                    stage=stage,
405	                    iteration=self.snapshot.iteration,
406	                    spec=self.snapshot.current_spec,
407	                    metadata={"action_required": action_required},
408	                )
409	            except Exception:
410	                pass
411	
412	        self._save_state()
413	        self._log_activity(
414	            f"{'🔴' if level == 'critical' else '⚠️' if level == 'warning' else 'ℹ️'} "
415	            f"[{stage}] {message}"
416	        )
417	
418	    # --------------------------------------------------
419	    # 预算检查
420	    # --------------------------------------------------
421	    def check_budget(self) -> dict:
422	        """检查预算使用情况"""
423	        used = self.snapshot.total_tokens_used
424	        limit = self.snapshot.budget_limit
425	        percent = (used / limit * 100) if limit > 0 else 0
426	
427	        status = "ok"
428	        if percent >= 95:
429	            status = "exceeded"
430	            self.add_alert("critical", "budget",
431	                          f"预算即将耗尽: {percent:.1f}% ({used}/{limit} tokens)",
432	                          action_required=True)
433	        elif percent >= 80:
434	            status = "warning"
435	            self.add_alert("warning", "budget",
436	                          f"预算使用超过 80%: {percent:.1f}% ({used}/{limit} tokens)")
437	
438	        return {
439	            "used": used,
440	            "limit": limit,
441	            "percent": round(percent, 1),
442	            "status": status,
443	        }
444	
445	    # --------------------------------------------------
446	    # 规范文件检测
447	    # --------------------------------------------------
448	    def check_pending_specs(self) -> list:
449	        """检查待处理的功能规范"""
450	        if not os.path.exists(self.specs_pending_dir):
451	            return []
452	        return [
453	            f for f in os.listdir(self.specs_pending_dir)
454	            if f.endswith(".md")
455	        ]
456	
457	    # --------------------------------------------------
458	    # 主循环接口（由 pipeline_runner 调用）
459	    # --------------------------------------------------
460	    def get_current_state(self) -> PipelineState:
461	        """获取当前状态"""
462	        return PipelineState(self.snapshot.current_state)
463	
464	    def start_stage(self, stage_name: str):
465	        """标记阶段开始"""
466	        if stage_name not in self.snapshot.stage_metrics:
467	            self.snapshot.stage_metrics[stage_name] = StageMetrics()
468	        metrics = self.snapshot.stage_metrics[stage_name]
469	        metrics.start_time = datetime.now()
470	        metrics.status = "running"
471	        self._log_activity(f"🚀 开始执行阶段: {stage_name}")
472	        self._save_state()
473	
474	    def complete_stage(self, stage_name: str, token_usage: int = 0,
475	                       success: bool = True):
476	        """标记阶段完成"""
477	        if stage_name in self.snapshot.stage_metrics:
478	            metrics = self.snapshot.stage_metrics[stage_name]
479	            metrics.end_time = datetime.now()
480	            metrics.token_usage += token_usage
481	            metrics.status = "passed" if success else "failed"
482	            self.snapshot.total_tokens_used += token_usage
483	
484	        status_icon = "✅" if success else "❌"
485	        self._log_activity(
486	            f"{status_icon} 阶段完成: {stage_name} "
487	            f"(tokens: {token_usage})"
488	        )
489	        self._save_state()
490	
491	    def record_review(self, stage_name: str, score: float,
492	                      passed: bool, feedback: dict):
493	        """记录评审结果"""
494	        if stage_name in self.snapshot.stage_metrics:
495	            metrics = self.snapshot.stage_metrics[stage_name]
496	            metrics.review_score = score
497	            metrics.review_passed = passed
498	            metrics.status = "review"
499	
500	        review_entry = {
501	            "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
502	            "stage": stage_name,
503	            "score": score,
504	            "passed": passed,
505	            "feedback": feedback,
506	        }
507	        self.snapshot.review_history.append(review_entry)
508	
509	        status_icon = "✅" if passed else "❌"
510	        self._log_activity(
511	            f"{status_icon} 评审结果: {stage_name} "
512	            f"(分数: {score}/100, 通过: {passed})"
513	        )
514	        self._save_state()
515	
516	    def get_status_summary(self) -> dict:
517	        """获取状态摘要（供 Dashboard 使用）"""
518	        stages_order = ["requirements", "design", "development", "testing"]
519	        stage_status = {}
520	
521	        for stage in stages_order:
522	            metrics = self.snapshot.stage_metrics.get(stage)
523	            if metrics:
524	                stage_status[stage] = {
525	                    "status": metrics.status,
526	                    "score": metrics.review_score,
527	                    "retries": metrics.retry_count,
528	                    "tokens": metrics.token_usage,
529	                    "start_time": metrics.start_time.isoformat() if metrics.start_time else None,
530	                    "end_time": metrics.end_time.isoformat() if metrics.end_time else None,
531	                }
532	            else:
533	                stage_status[stage] = {
534	                    "status": "pending",
535	                    "score": None,
536	                    "retries": 0,
537	                    "tokens": 0,
538	                    "start_time": None,
539	                    "end_time": None,
540	                }
541	
542	        budget = self.check_budget()
543	
544	        return {
545	            "current_state": self.snapshot.current_state,
546	            "current_spec": self.snapshot.current_spec,
547	            "iteration": self.snapshot.iteration,
548	            "total_iterations": self.snapshot.total_iterations,
549	            "stages": stage_status,
550	            "budget": budget,
551	            "recent_alerts": [
552	                a for a in self.snapshot.alerts[-10:]
553	                if not a.resolved
554	            ],
555	            "recent_activities": self.snapshot.activity_log[-20:],
556	            "pending_specs": self.check_pending_specs(),
557	        }
558	
559	    def reset_for_new_iteration(self):
560	        """重置为新一轮迭代"""
561	        self.snapshot.iteration += 1
562	        self.snapshot.total_iterations += 1
563	        # 不清除历史指标，只更新状态
564	        self._save_state()

1	"""冒泡排序模块。
2	
3	提供经典冒泡排序算法的纯函数实现，支持整数和浮点数列表的升序排序。
4	
5	设计要点（来自 architecture.md / api_design.md）：
6	  - 纯函数语义：返回新列表，不修改输入
7	  - 提前终止优化：通过 swapped 标志位，已排序列表 O(n)
8	  - 排序稳定性：使用严格 > 比较，相等元素保持原始顺序
9	  - 异常处理：非列表输入或包含非数值元素时抛出 TypeError
10	  - 禁止使用内置 sorted() / list.sort()
11	"""
12	
13	from __future__ import annotations
14	
15	
16	def bubble_sort(arr: list[int | float]) -> list[int | float]:
17	    """对数值列表进行升序冒泡排序，返回排序后的新列表。
18	
19	    算法逻辑：
20	      1. 复制输入列表（纯函数保证）
21	      2. 外层循环控制趟数（最多 n-1 趟）
22	      3. 内层循环执行相邻元素比较与交换
23	      4. swapped 标志位实现提前终止优化
24	      5. 使用严格 > 比较确保排序稳定性
25	
26	    Args:
27	        arr: 包含整数或浮点数的列表。
28	
29	    Returns:
30	        升序排列的新列表，原列表不被修改。
31	
32	    Raises:
33	        TypeError: 当 arr 不是 list 类型时。
34	        TypeError: 当 arr 中包含非数值（int/float）元素时。
35	
36	    Examples:
37	        >>> bubble_sort([3, 1, 2])
38	        [1, 2, 3]
39	        >>> bubble_sort([])
40	        []
41	        >>> bubble_sort([1])
42	        [1]
43	        >>> original = [5, 3, 1]
44	        >>> sorted_list = bubble_sort(original)
45	        >>> original  # 原列表未被修改
46	        [5, 3, 1]
47	    """
48	    # --- 输入校验 ---
49	    if not isinstance(arr, list):
50	        raise TypeError(
51	            f"bubble_sort() 参数必须是 list 类型，"
52	            f"收到 {type(arr).__name__}"
53	        )
54	
55	    # EAFP 策略：遍历检查每个元素是否为数值类型
56	    for i, item in enumerate(arr):
57	        if not isinstance(item, (int, float)):
58	            raise TypeError(
59	                f"列表元素必须是 int 或 float 类型，"
60	                f"索引 {i} 处收到 {type(item).__name__}: {item!r}"
61	            )
62	
63	    # --- 边界情况：空列表或单元素列表直接返回副本 ---
64	    n = len(arr)
65	    if n <= 1:
66	        return arr[:]
67	
68	    # --- 核心冒泡排序算法 ---
69	    # 步骤 1：复制输入列表，保证纯函数语义
70	    result = arr[:]
71	
72	    # 步骤 2：外层循环，最多执行 n-1 趟
73	    for i in range(n - 1):
74	        # 步骤 4：swapped 标志位，实现提前终止优化
75	        swapped = False
76	
77	        # 步骤 3：内层循环，每趟将当前未排序部分的最大值"冒泡"到末尾
78	        # 每完成一趟，末尾的 i 个元素已排好，无需再比较
79	        for j in range(n - 1 - i):
80	            # 步骤 5：严格 > 比较，保证排序稳定性
81	            # （相等元素不交换，从而保持原始相对顺序）
82	            if result[j] > result[j + 1]:
83	                result[j], result[j + 1] = result[j + 1], result[j]
84	                swapped = True
85	
86	        # 如果本趟未发生交换，说明列表已有序，提前终止
87	        if not swapped:
88	            break
89	
90	    return result
91

1	# Harness Control Plane - 完整介绍文档
2	
3	## 一、概述
4	
5	**Harness Control Plane** 是一套可运行的长时任务编排框架，围绕 `Feishu -> Claude Code CLI -> Review -> QA -> Gerrit` 主链构建，目标是让用户能在 `localhost` 实时看到 harness 的整个执行过程，并且在关键节点人工接管。
6	
7	它的核心理念是：**让多个 Agent 像工厂流水线一样自动协作，但保持全链路可观测、可暂停、可恢复、可人工介入。**
8	
9	---
10	
11	## 零、当前实现状态
12	
13	当前仓库已经落地了一个可运行 MVP：
14	
15	1. Web 请求入口：`POST /api/requests`
16	2. 飞书 webhook 入口：`POST /api/feishu/webhook`
17	3. Claude Code CLI 适配层：优先真实调用，未配置时自动降级到 simulation mode
18	4. 多阶段 pipeline：`intake -> planning -> requirements -> design -> development -> code_review -> security_review -> testing -> delivery`
19	5. 实时 UI：`GET /`，通过 SSE 订阅 `/api/stream`
20	6. 人工介入：审批列表与批准/拒绝接口
21	7. Gerrit 交付：将当前 repo 的 `HEAD` 推送到 `refs/for/<branch>%topic=<task_id>`
22	8. 状态持久化：任务、审批、事件、transcript、产物摘要均落盘
23	
24	---
25	
26	## 零点一、启动方式
27	
28	安装依赖：
29	
30	```bash
31	pip install -r requirements/runtime.txt
32	```
33	
34	启动服务：
35	
36	```bash
37	python engine/pipeline_runner.py --harness-dir . --web-port 8080
38	```
39	
40	浏览器访问：
41	
42	```text
43	http://localhost:8080
44	```
45	
46	如果你还没有配置 Claude Code CLI，可先使用默认的 simulation mode；如果要切到真实 CLI，把 `data/integration_settings.json` 或 `settings.example.json` 中的 `claude.simulate` 改成 `false`，并配置 `target_repo`。
47	
48	---
49	
50	## 二、整体架构
51	
52	```
53	┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
54	│                    AutoDev Harness 架构                       │
55	├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
56	│                                                              │
57	│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
58	│  │  输入层: specs/pending/ (文件监听触发)               │    │
59	│  └────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────┘    │
60	│                       ▼                                      │
61	│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
62	│  │  执行层: 四阶段流水线                                │    │

162	## 四、五大核心设计详解
163	
164	### 4.1 三层循环嵌套机制
165	
166	```
167	主循环 (Feature Loop)
168	├── while True:
169	│   ├── 检测 specs/pending/ 是否有新规范
170	│   ├── 有 → 处理完整流水线
171	│   ├── 无 → sleep(poll_interval) 继续轮询
172	│   │
173	│   ├── 阶段重试循环 (Stage Retry Loop)
174	│   │   ├── for attempt in range(max_retries):
175	│   │   │   ├── 执行阶段
176	│   │   │   ├── 评审产物
177	│   │   │   ├── 通过 → break
178	│   │   │   └── 不通过 → 重试
179	│   │   └── 超过次数 → 退回或暂停
180	│   │
181	│   └── 反馈回流循环 (Feedback Loop)
182	│       ├── 测试通过 → DONE → IDLE
183	│       ├── 有 Bug → 退回 DEVELOPMENT
184	│       ├── 需求问题 → 退回 REQUIREMENTS
185	│       └── 设计不一致 → 退回 DESIGN
186	```
187	
188	### 4.2 独立产物评审协议
189	
190	每个阶段完成后，由**独立的 review-agent**（不是产出者本身）评审：
191	
192	```
193	评审维度（需求阶段为例）：
194	├── 功能完整性 (25%) - 所有功能点是否识别
195	├── 验收标准   (25%) - 是否有 Given/When/Then
196	├── 无歧义性   (20%) - 是否有模糊描述词
197	├── 非功能需求 (15%) - 是否量化
198	└── 优先级分类 (15%) - 是否 P0~P3 分级
199	```
200	
201	每条标准独立打分 → 加权总分 → ≥80 分通过，否则退回重做。
202	
203	### 4.3 上下文蒸馏机制
204	
205	长流水线上下文爆炸问题的解决方案：
206	
207	```
208	需求文档 (5000字) → [蒸馏器] → 结构化摘要 (1500字)
209	    ├── 关键决策列表
210	    ├── 接口契约摘要
211	    ├── 数据实体列表
212	    └── 未解决问题
213	
214	设计文档 (8000字) → [蒸馏器] → 结构化摘要 (2000字)
215	    ├── API 路径列表
216	    ├── 数据模型 ER 摘要
217	    └── 技术选型决策
218	```
219	
220	跨阶段交接时，传递的是**蒸馏后的摘要包**，而非原始文档。
221	
222	### 4.4 跨阶段一致性检测
223	
224	自动检查三条一致性链路：
225	
226	```
227	1. 需求↔设计：
228	   - 设计中的每个功能模块是否追溯到需求编号
229	   - 设计中是否有超出需求范围的功能
230	
231	2. 设计↔代码：
232	   - API 路径是否与设计文档一致
233	   - 数据模型字段是否对齐
234	
235	3. 需求↔测试：
236	   - 每个需求功能点是否有对应测试用例
237	   - 测试用例的 AC 与需求 AC 是否一致
238	```
239	
240	产出追溯矩阵（Traceability Matrix）：
241	
242	| 需求编号 | 设计文档 | 代码模块 | 测试用例 | 覆盖度 |
243	|---------|---------|---------|---------|--------|
244	| F001    | ✅      | ✅      | ✅      | full   |
245	| F002    | ✅      | ✅      | ❌      | partial|
246	| F003    | ❌      | ❌      | ❌      | none   |
247	
248	### 4.5 预算与成本控制
249	
250	```yaml
251	预算维度：
252	├── Token 限制: 每个 Feature 500K tokens
253	├── 时间限制: 每个 Feature 120 分钟
254	├── 重试限制: 单阶段 3 次，总计 10 次
255	├── 告警阈值: 80% 使用量发出警告
256	└── 硬限制: 95% 使用量强制暂停
257	```
258

262	
263	### 5.1 五个 Agent 角色
264	
265	| Agent | 职责 | 输入 | 输出 |
266	|-------|------|------|------|
267	| **requirements-analyst** | 需求分析 | 功能规范 | requirements_spec.md |
268	| **system-architect** | 系统设计 | 需求规格 | architecture.md + api_design.md + data_model.md |
269	| **developer** | 代码开发 | 设计文档 | src/ 源码 |
270	| **qa-engineer** | 质量测试 | 源码+需求 | 测试用例 + 测试报告 |
271	| **review-agent** | 独立评审 | 阶段产物 | 评分 + 改进建议 |
272	
273	### 5.2 Claude Code CLI Agent 模式
274	
275	Agent 定义文件存放在 `.claude/agents/` 目录下：
276	
277	```
278	.claude/agents/
279	├── requirements-analyst.md
280	├── system-architect.md
281	├── developer.md
282	├── qa-engineer.md
283	├── code-reviewer.md
284	├── security-reviewer.md
285	└── debugger.md
286	```
287	
288	Pipeline 通过 `claude --agent <agent_id>` 调用对应的 agent 定义。

336	
337	### 方式一：使用启动脚本（推荐）

339	```bash

349	### 方式二：命令行运行
350	
351	```bash

353	pip install flask

356	cd harness
357	python engine/pipeline_runner.py --harness-dir . --web-port 8080
358	
359	# 单次运行（处理一个规范后退出）

366	### 方式三：独立使用各组件
367	
368	```python
369	# 只使用一致性检查器
370	from engine.reviewers.consistency_checker import ConsistencyChecker
371	checker = ConsistencyChecker("/path/to/harness")
372	results = checker.run_all_checks()
373	
374	# 只使用变更影响分析
375	from engine.reviewers.change_impact_analyzer import ChangeImpactAnalyzer
376	analyzer = ChangeImpactAnalyzer("/path/to/harness")
377	impact = analyzer.analyze_change("修改登录密码规则为至少12位")
378	
379	# 只使用上下文蒸馏器

387	## 八、配置定制
388	
389	### 修改评审标准
390	编辑 `review_protocol.yaml`，调整各阶段的评审维度和权重。
391	
392	### 修改预算限制
393	编辑 `budget.yaml`，调整 Token 限制、时间限制、告警阈值。
394	
395	### 修改流水线行为
396	编辑 `pipeline.yaml`，调整：
397	- 阶段超时时间
398	- 最大重试次数
399	- 人工介入触发条件
400	- 轮询间隔
401	
402	### 添加新阶段
403	在 `pipeline.yaml` 的 `stages` 中添加新阶段定义，在 `agents/agents.yaml` 中定义对应 Agent。

406	
407	## 九、设计哲学
408	
409	1. **产物驱动**：每个阶段有明确的输入/输出文件，而非模糊的"信息传递"
410	2. **独立评审**：产出者不评审自己的产物，由独立的 review-agent 负责质量把关
411	3. **可追溯**：需求→设计→代码→测试全链路可追溯，任意变更可分析影响范围
412	4. **渐进式自动化**：从 STATUS.md → Web Dashboard → 告警推送，按需叠加
413	5. **安全降级**：预算耗尽、重试超限、检测到歧义时自动暂停，等人工介入
414	6. **断点续跑**：所有状态持久化，进程中断后可从断点恢复

58	- 键盘映射表、触屏手势处理流程、方向队列机制
59	- 接口调用关系 Mermaid 图
60	
61	### 3. `design/data_model.md` — 数据模型设计
62	- **ER 图**（Mermaid 语法）：9 个实体及其关系
63	- **9 个实体的完整字段定义**：GameState、Snake、Segment、Direction、Food、Score、SpeedConfig、InputBuffer、RenderConfig
64	- 每个字段含类型、默认值、约束、来源需求编号
65	- **速度变化对照表**：11 级速度从 150ms 到 50ms
66	- **3 个时序图**：初始化、吃食物、游戏结束的完整数据流生命周期
67	- **完整运行时状态快照示例**
68	- localStorage 持久化方案与安全约束
69	
70	所有设计决策均标注了来源需求编号（REQ-F001~F014, NFR001~NFR005），满足评审协议 DES-C03 的追溯性要求。

1	"""贪吃蛇 (Snake Game) 核心逻辑单元测试。
2	
3	通过 extracting JS 逻辑到独立模块并使用 Node.js 执行测试来
4	验证所有核心游戏功能 (F001-F014) 和非功能需求 (NFR001-NFR005)。
5	
6	测试策略：
7	  - 将纯逻辑函数从 snake.html 中提取出来
8	  - 使用 subprocess 调用 Node.js 执行 JavaScript 测试
9	  - 每个测试方法对应一个或多个需求编号
10	"""
11	
12	from __future__ import annotations
13	
14	import json
15	import subprocess
16	import textwrap
17	from pathlib import Path
18	
19	import pytest
20	
21	
22	# ─── 测试辅助：提取核心 JS 逻辑并在 Node.js 中执行 ─────────────
23	
24	SNAKE_HTML = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent / "src" / "snake.html"
25	
26	
27	def _extract_js(html_path: Path) -> str:
28	    """从 snake.html 中提取 <script> 标签内的 JavaScript 代码。"""
29	    content = html_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
30	    start = content.index("<script>") + len("<script>")
31	    end = content.index("</script>")
32	    return content[start:end]
33	
34	
35	def _run_js(script: str) -> dict:
36	    """在 Node.js 中执行 JavaScript 代码并返回 JSON 结果。
37	
38	    Args:
39	        script: 完整的 JS 脚本 (包含 mock + 游戏逻辑 + 测试代码)
40	
41	    Returns:
42	        解析后的 JSON 字典
43	
44	    Raises:
45	        RuntimeError: 当 Node.js 执行失败时
46	    """
47	    result = subprocess.run(
48	        ["node", "-e", script],
49	        capture_output=True,
50	        text=True,
51	        timeout=10,
52	    )
53	    if result.returncode != 0:
54	        raise RuntimeError(
55	            f"Node.js execution failed:\nSTDOUT: {result.stdout}\nSTDERR: {result.stderr}"
56	        )
57	    # 取最后一行非空输出作为 JSON 结果
58	    lines = [l.strip() for l in result.stdout.strip().split("\n") if l.strip()]
59	    if not lines:
60	        raise RuntimeError("No output from Node.js")
61	    return json.loads(lines[-1])
62	
63	
64	# ─── DOM/Canvas Mock — 提供浏览器 API 的最小模拟 ─────────────
65	
66	MOCK_BROWSER = textwrap.dedent("""\
67	    // Mock browser APIs for Node.js testing
68	    global.window = {
69	        innerWidth: 800, innerHeight: 600,
70	        addEventListener: () => {},
71	        AudioContext: null, webkitAudioContext: null
72	    };
73	    global.document = {
74	        getElementById: (id) => {
75	            if (id === 'gameCanvas') return {
76	                getContext: () => ({
77	                    fillStyle: '', strokeStyle: '', lineWidth: 0,
78	                    fillRect: () => {}, fillText: () => {},
79	                    beginPath: () => {}, moveTo: () => {}, lineTo: () => {},
80	                    stroke: () => {}, arc: () => {}, fill: () => {},
81	                    clearRect: () => {}
82	                }),
83	                getBoundingClientRect: () => ({ left: 0, top: 0, width: 400, height: 400 }),
84	                width: 400, height: 400,
85	                addEventListener: () => {}
86	            };
87	            return {
88	                textContent: '', style: {},
89	                classList: { add: () => {}, remove: () => {} },
90	                addEventListener: () => {}
91	            };
92	        },
93	        addEventListener: () => {}
94	    };
95	    global.localStorage = {
96	        _store: {},
97	        getItem(k) { return this._store[k] || null; },
98	        setItem(k, v) { this._store[k] = String(v); },
99	        removeItem(k) { delete this._store[k]; }
100	    };
101	    global.requestAnimationFrame = () => 0;
102	    global.cancelAnimationFrame = () => {};
103	""")
104	
105	
106	def _build_test_script(test_code: str) -> str:
107	    """组合 mock + 游戏源码 + 测试代码。"""
108	    js_source = _extract_js(SNAKE_HTML)
109	    # 移除末尾的自执行代码 (resizeCanvas/initGame/render)
110	    # 这些在测试中手动调用
111	    js_source_clean = js_source.replace(
112	        "resizeCanvas();\ninitGame();\nrender();",
113	        "// [REMOVED FOR TESTING] resizeCanvas/initGame/render auto-calls"
114	    )
115	    return f"{MOCK_BROWSER}\n{js_source_clean}\n\n{test_code}"

883	class TestIntegration:

885	
886	    def test_full_game_cycle(self) -> None:
887	        """集成测试: 初始化 → 移动 → 吃食物 → 撞墙 → 结束。"""
888	        result = _run_js(_build_test_script("""
889	            initGame();
890	            const s0 = state;
891	
892	            // 开始游戏
893	            state = STATE.PLAYING;
894	            const s1 = state;
895	
896	            // 放置食物在蛇头前方, 吃食物
897	            food = { x: snake[0].x + 1, y: snake[0].y };
898	            update();
899	            const scoreAfterEat = score;
900	            const lenAfterEat = snake.length;
901	
902	            // 移动几步 (不吃食物)
903	            food = { x: 0, y: 0 };
904	            for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
905	                if (state !== 'PLAYING') break;
906	                update();
907	            }
908	
909	            // 移到墙边并撞墙
910	            snake[0] = { x: GRID - 1, y: snake[0].y };
911	            snake[1] = { x: GRID - 2, y: snake[0].y };
912	            snake[2] = { x: GRID - 3, y: snake[0].y };
913	            if (snake.length > 3) snake[3] = { x: GRID - 4, y: snake[0].y };
914	            nextDirection = DIR.RIGHT;
915	            directionChanged = false;
916	            update();
917	            const sFinal = state;
918	
919	            console.log(JSON.stringify({
920	                s0, s1, scoreAfterEat, lenAfterEat, sFinal
921	            }))
922	        """))

924	        assert result["s1"] == "PLAYING"
925	        assert result["scoreAfterEat"] == 10
926	        assert result["lenAfterEat"] == 4
927	        assert result["sFinal"] == "GAME_OVER"

99	class PipelineRunner:
100	    """Coordinates requests, agents, event streaming, and manual approvals."""
101	
102	    def __init__(self, harness_dir: str):
103	        self.harness_dir = harness_dir
104	        self.state_store = StateStore(harness_dir)
105	        self.data_dir = os.path.join(harness_dir, "data")
106	        self.tasks_dir = os.path.join(self.data_dir, "tasks")
107	        self.runs_dir = os.path.join(harness_dir, "runs")
108	        self.specs_pending = os.path.join(harness_dir, "specs", "pending")
109	        self.specs_processed = os.path.join(harness_dir, "specs", "processed")
110	        self.settings_file = os.path.join(self.data_dir, "integration_settings.json")
111	        self.runtime_file = os.path.join(self.data_dir, "runtime_state.json")
112	        self.transcript_dir = os.path.join(self.data_dir, "transcripts")
113	        self.report_dir = os.path.join(self.data_dir, "reports")
114	        self.lock = threading.RLock()
115	        self.running = False
116	        self.paused = False
117	        self.worker_thread: Optional[threading.Thread] = None
118	
119	        for directory in [
120	            self.data_dir,

162	    def _load_yaml(self, path: str, default: Dict) -> Dict:
163	        if not os.path.exists(path) or yaml is None:
164	            return default
165	        with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
166	            loaded = yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}
167	        return loaded if isinstance(loaded, dict) else default

203	    def _load_settings(self) -> Dict:
204	        settings = self._default_settings()
205	        if os.path.exists(self.settings_file):
206	            with open(self.settings_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as handle:

212	    def _build_agent_state(self) -> Dict[str, Dict]:
213	        configured = {agent.get("id"): agent for agent in self.agent_config.get("agents", [])}
214	        agents: Dict[str, Dict] = {}
215	        for agent in DEFAULT_AGENTS:
216	            merged = dict(agent)
217	            merged.update(configured.get(agent["id"], {}))
218	            merged.update(
219	                {
220	                    "status": "idle",
221	                    "current_task_id": None,
222	                    "last_stage": None,
223	                    "last_message": "",
224	                    "completed_tasks": 0,
225	                }
226	            )
227	            agents[merged["id"]] = merged
228	        return agents

230	    def _resolve_pipeline_order(self) -> List[str]:
231	        configured = [stage.get("id") for stage in self.pipeline_config.get("stages", []) if stage.get("id")]
232	        if configured:
233	            missing_required = [stage for stage in DEFAULT_PIPELINE_ORDER if stage not in configured]
234	            if missing_required:
235	                return list(DEFAULT_PIPELINE_ORDER)
236	            seen = set()
237	            order = []
238	            for stage in configured:
239	                if stage not in seen:
240	                    order.append(stage)
241	                    seen.add(stage)
242	            return order
243	        return list(DEFAULT_PIPELINE_ORDER)

245	    def _load_runtime_state(self) -> Dict:
246	        stored = self.state_store.load_document("runtime_state")
247	        if stored is not None:
248	            return stored
249	        if not os.path.exists(self.runtime_file):
250	            return {
251	                "tasks": [],
252	                "current_task_id": None,
253	                "started_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
254	                "updated_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
255	            }
256	        with open(self.runtime_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
257	            return json.load(handle)

259	    def _ensure_runtime_shape(self) -> None:
260	        self.runtime.setdefault("tasks", [])
261	        self.runtime.setdefault("current_task_id", None)
262	        self.runtime.setdefault("started_at", datetime.now().isoformat())
263	        self.runtime.setdefault("updated_at", datetime.now().isoformat())
264	        for task in self.runtime["tasks"]:
265	            task.setdefault("approvals", [])
266	            task.setdefault("context", {})
267	            task.setdefault("artifacts", {})
268	            task.setdefault("gerrit", {})
269	            task.setdefault("source_metadata", {})
270	            task.setdefault("run_dir", self._ensure_run_layout(task["id"]))
271	            stage_defaults = self._empty_stage_map()
272	            existing = task.setdefault("stages", {})
273	            for stage_id, stage_payload in stage_defaults.items():
274	                existing.setdefault(stage_id, stage_payload)
275	            self._write_run_metadata(task)

288	                "artifact_paths": [],

294	    def _persist_runtime(self) -> None:
295	        self.runtime["updated_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()

297	        self._save_json(self.runtime_file, self.runtime)

299	    def _save_json(self, path: str, payload: Dict) -> None:
300	        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(path), exist_ok=True)
301	        with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
302	            json.dump(payload, handle, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)

304	    def _save_text(self, path: str, content: str) -> None:
305	        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(path), exist_ok=True)
306	        with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
307	            handle.write(content)

309	    def _deep_merge(self, base: Dict, override: Dict) -> Dict:
310	        result = dict(base)
311	        for key, value in override.items():
312	            if isinstance(value, dict) and isinstance(result.get(key), dict):
313	                result[key] = self._deep_merge(result[key], value)
314	            else:
315	                result[key] = value
316	        return result

318	    def start(self) -> None:
319	        if self.running:
320	            return
321	        self.running = True
322	        self.worker_thread = threading.Thread(target=self._run_loop, daemon=True)
323	        self.worker_thread.start()
324	        self._emit("runner_started", "Harness runner started", source="system")

326	    def stop(self) -> None:

334	    def resume(self) -> None:

338	    def submit_request(self, text: str, title: Optional[str] = None, source: str = "web", metadata: Optional[Dict] = None) -> Dict:
339	        task_id = f"task-{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d%H%M%S')}-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}"
340	        spec_file = f"{task_id}.md"
341	        spec_path = os.path.join(self.specs_pending, spec_file)
342	        content = f"# {title or 'User Request'}\n\n{text.strip()}\n"
343	        self._save_text(spec_path, content)
344	        run_dir = self._ensure_run_layout(task_id)
345	
346	        task = {
347	            "id": task_id,
348	            "title": title or "Untitled request",
349	            "request_text": text.strip(),
350	            "source": source,
351	            "source_metadata": metadata or {},
352	            "spec_file": spec_file,
353	            "run_dir": run_dir,
354	            "status": "queued",
355	            "current_stage": "intake",
356	            "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
357	            "updated_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
358	            "approvals": [],
359	            "context": {},
360	            "artifacts": {},
361	            "gerrit": {},
362	            "stages": self._empty_stage_map(),
363	            "pipeline_snapshot": list(self.pipeline_order),  # Record pipeline at task creation time
364	        }
365	
366	        with self.lock:
367	            self.runtime["tasks"].append(task)
368	            self._persist_runtime()
369	        self._update_latest_run_link(run_dir)
370	        self._write_run_metadata(task)
371	
372	        self._emit("task_submitted", f"New request submitted from {source}", source=source, task_id=task_id, data={"title": task["title"]})
373	        return task
374	
375	    def get_runtime_snapshot(self) -> Dict:
376	        with self.lock:
377	            tasks = list(reversed(self.runtime["tasks"][-20:]))
378	            approvals = []
379	            for task in tasks:
380	                for approval in task.get("approvals", []):
381	                    if approval.get("status") == "pending":
382	                        approvals.append(dict(approval, task_id=task["id"], task_title=task["title"]))
383	            stats = {
384	                "total": len(self.runtime["tasks"]),
385	                "queued": sum(1 for task in self.runtime["tasks"] if task["status"] == "queued"),
386	                "running": sum(1 for task in self.runtime["tasks"] if task["status"] == "running"),
387	                "waiting_human": sum(1 for task in self.runtime["tasks"] if task["status"] == "waiting_human"),
388	                "completed": sum(1 for task in self.runtime["tasks"] if task["status"] == "completed"),
389	                "failed": sum(1 for task in self.runtime["tasks"] if task["status"] == "failed"),
390	            }
391	            return {
392	                "runner": {
393	                    "running": self.running,
394	                    "paused": self.paused,
395	                    "current_task_id": self.runtime.get("current_task_id"),
396	                    "updated_at": self.runtime.get("updated_at"),
397	                },
398	                "pipeline_order": self.pipeline_order,
399	                "stats": stats,
400	                "tasks": tasks,
401	                "approvals": approvals,
402	                "agents": list(self.agents.values()),
403	                "settings": self.settings,
404	                "events": self.event_bus.latest(200),
405	                "budget": self.engine.check_budget(),
406	            }
407	
408	    def update_settings(self, payload: Dict) -> Dict:
409	        with self.lock:
410	            self.settings = self._deep_merge(self.settings, payload)
411	            self._save_json(self.settings_file, self.settings)
412	            self.claude = ClaudeCLIAdapter(self.settings["claude"])
413	            self.feishu = FeishuAdapter(self.settings["feishu"], state_store=self.state_store)
414	            self.gerrit = GerritAdapter(self.settings["gerrit"])
415	            self.hil = HILAdapter(self.settings["hil"])
416	            self.build_verifier = BuildVerificationAdapter(self.settings["build_verification"])
417	            self._persist_runtime()
418	        self._emit("settings_updated", "Integration settings updated", source="system")
419	        return self.settings
420	
421	    def resolve_approval(self, task_id: str, approval_id: str, resolution: str, note: str = "") -> Dict:
422	        with self.lock:
423	            task = self._require_task(task_id)
424	            for approval in task.get("approvals", []):
425	                if approval["id"] != approval_id:
426	                    continue
427	                approval["status"] = resolution
428	                approval["resolved_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
429	                approval["note"] = note
430	                task["updated_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
431	                self._emit("approval_resolved", f"Approval {resolution} for {task['title']}", source="human", task_id=task_id, stage=approval.get("stage"), data={"approval_id": approval_id, "note": note, "resolution": resolution})
432	                if resolution == "approved":
433	                    task["status"] = "running"
434	                elif resolution == "rejected":
435	                    task["status"] = "failed"
436	                self._persist_runtime()
437	                return approval
438	        raise KeyError(f"Approval {approval_id} not found for task {task_id}")
439	
440	    def _require_task(self, task_id: str) -> Dict:
441	        for task in self.runtime["tasks"]:
442	            if task["id"] == task_id:
443	                return task
444	        raise KeyError(f"Task {task_id} not found")
445	
446	    def _run_loop(self) -> None:
447	        while self.running:
448	            if self.paused:
449	                time.sleep(1)
450	                continue
451	            next_task = self._next_queued_task()
452	            if next_task is None:
453	                time.sleep(1)
454	                continue
455	            self._process_task(next_task)
456	
457	    def _next_queued_task(self) -> Optional[Dict]:
458	        with self.lock:
459	            for task in self.runtime["tasks"]:
460	                if task["status"] == "queued":
461	                    return task
462	        return None
463	
464	    def _process_task(self, task: Dict) -> None:
465	        task_id = task["id"]
466	        with self.lock:
467	            task["status"] = "running"
468	            task["updated_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
469	            self.runtime["current_task_id"] = task_id
470	            self._persist_runtime()
471	
472	        self.engine.snapshot.current_spec = task["spec_file"]
473	        self.engine.reset_for_new_iteration()
474	        # 确保状态机在正确的初始状态
475	        if self.engine.snapshot.current_state != "idle":
476	            self.engine.snapshot.current_state = "idle"
477	            self.engine._save_state()
478	        result = self.engine.transition("new_spec")
479	        if result is None:
480	            self._fail_task(task, "Failed to transition pipeline to REQUIREMENTS state")
481	            return
482	        self._update_latest_run_link(task["run_dir"])
483	        self._emit("task_started", f"Processing {task['title']}", task_id=task_id, source="pipeline")
484	
485	        # Rebuild context from previously passed stages
486	        context = {"request_text": task["request_text"]}
487	        context.update(task.get("context", {}))
488	
489	        for stage in self.pipeline_order:
490	            # Skip stages that already passed (resume support)
491	            stage_data = task["stages"].get(stage, {})
492	            if stage_data.get("status") in ("passed", "completed"):
493	                self._emit("stage_skipped", f"{STAGE_TITLES.get(stage, stage)} already passed, skipping", source="pipeline", task_id=task_id, stage=stage)
494	                continue
495	
496	            with self.lock:
497	                task["current_stage"] = stage
498	                task["updated_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
499	                self._persist_runtime()
500	
501	            if self._requires_manual_gate(task, stage):
502	                approval = self._create_approval(task, stage, "Risky request requires human confirmation before continuing")
503	                approved = self._wait_for_approval(task, approval)
504	                if not approved:
505	                    self._fail_task(task, f"Approval rejected at {stage}")
506	                    return
507	
508	            if stage == "delivery":
509	                if not self._run_delivery_stage(task, context):
510	                    self._fail_task(task, "Delivery stage failed")
511	                    return
512	                continue
513	
514	            if stage == "build_verification":
515	                if not self._run_build_verification_stage(task, context):
516	                    self._fail_task(task, "Build verification stage failed")
517	                    return
518	                continue
519	
520	            if not self._run_stage_with_retries(task, stage, context):
521	                return
522	
523	        self._complete_task(task)
524	
525	    def _run_stage_with_retries(self, task: Dict, stage: str, context: Dict) -> bool:
526	        stage_state = task["stages"][stage]
527	        max_retries = self._stage_max_retries(stage)
528	        budget = self.engine.check_budget()
529	        if budget["status"] == "exceeded":
530	            self._fail_task(task, f"Budget hard stop reached before {stage}")
531	            return False
532	
533	        for attempt in range(1, max_retries + 1):
534	            with self.lock:
535	                stage_state["attempts"] = attempt
536	                stage_state["status"] = "running"
537	                stage_state["started_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
538	                stage_state["summary"] = ""
539	                self._persist_runtime()
540	            self.engine.start_stage(stage)
541	            agent_id = stage_state["agent_id"]
542	            self._set_agent_status(agent_id, "running", task["id"], stage, f"Running {stage}")
543	            self._emit("stage_started", f"{STAGE_TITLES.get(stage, stage)} started", source="pipeline", task_id=task["id"], stage=stage)
544	
545	            prompt = self._build_prompt(task, stage, context)
546	            remaining_tokens = max(0, self.engine.snapshot.budget_limit - self.engine.snapshot.total_tokens_used)
547	            result = self.claude.run_agent(
548	                agent_id=agent_id,
549	                prompt=prompt,
550	                cwd=self.settings["target_repo"],
551	                stage=stage,
552	                system_prompt=self._agent_identity(agent_id),
553	                max_tokens=remaining_tokens,
554	                event_callback=lambda event: self._record_agent_event(task, stage, agent_id, event),
555	            )
556	
557	            transcript_path = self._write_transcript(task, stage, result)
558	            summary, verdict = self._summarize_result(stage, result.output_text, result.verdict)
559	            artifact_paths = self._materialize_stage_artifacts(task, stage, summary, result.output_text, transcript_path)
560	            context[stage] = {"summary": summary, "verdict": verdict, "artifact_paths": artifact_paths}
561	
562	            passed = result.success and verdict != "FAIL"
563	            if stage in {"code_review", "security_review", "safety_review", "testing"}:
564	                passed = passed and verdict != "NEED_HUMAN"
565	
566	            with self.lock:
567	                stage_state["status"] = "passed" if passed else "failed"
568	                stage_state["summary"] = summary
569	                stage_state["verdict"] = verdict
570	                stage_state["ended_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
571	                stage_state["artifact_paths"] = artifact_paths
572	                self._persist_runtime()
573	            self.engine.complete_stage(stage, token_usage=result.tokens_estimate, success=passed)
574	            self._set_agent_status(agent_id, "idle", None, stage, summary)
575	
576	            if result.budget_exceeded:
577	                self._fail_task(task, f"Budget hard stop triggered during {stage}")
578	                return False
579	
580	            if passed:
581	                self._post_stage_processing(task, stage, summary, artifact_paths)
582	                self._emit("stage_completed", f"{STAGE_TITLES.get(stage, stage)} passed", source="pipeline", task_id=task["id"], stage=stage, data={"verdict": verdict})
583	                return True
584	
585	            self._emit("stage_failed", f"{STAGE_TITLES.get(stage, stage)} failed on attempt {attempt}", source="pipeline", task_id=task["id"], stage=stage, level="error", data={"summary": summary, "verdict": verdict})
586	
587	            if verdict == "NEED_HUMAN":
588	                approval = self._create_approval(task, stage, summary or f"Manual action required at {stage}")
589	                approved = self._wait_for_approval(task, approval)
590	                if not approved:
591	                    self._fail_task(task, f"Approval rejected at {stage}")
592	                    return False
593	
594	            if attempt < max_retries and stage in {"development", "code_review", "security_review", "safety_review", "testing"}:
595	                if not self._run_debugger(task, stage, summary, context):
596	                    break
597	
598	        self._fail_task(task, f"Stage {stage} exhausted retries")
599	        return False
600	
601	    def _run_debugger(self, task: Dict, failed_stage: str, failure_summary: str, context: Dict) -> bool:
602	        debugger_stage = {
603	            "title": STAGE_TITLES["debugger"],
604	            "status": "running",
605	            "agent_id": "debugger",
606	            "attempts": 1,
607	            "summary": "",
608	            "verdict": None,
609	            "started_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
610	            "ended_at": None,
611	            "artifact_paths": [],
612	            "logs": [],
613	        }
614	        task["stages"]["debugger"] = debugger_stage
615	        self._set_agent_status("debugger", "running", task["id"], "debugger", f"Fixing {failed_stage}")
616	
617	        # 检查预算
618	        budget = self.engine.check_budget()
619	        if budget["status"] == "exceeded":
620	            self._emit("budget_exceeded", "Budget exceeded before debugger stage", source="system", task_id=task["id"], level="error")
621	            return False
622	
623	        prompt = (
624	            f"Task: {task['title']}\n"
625	            f"Failed stage: {failed_stage}\n"
626	            f"Failure summary: {failure_summary}\n"
627	            "Apply the smallest possible correction plan and report the fix scope.\n"
628	            "Finish with VERDICT: PASS when a targeted fix is prepared."
629	        )
630	        remaining_tokens = max(0, self.engine.snapshot.budget_limit - self.engine.snapshot.total_tokens_used)
631	        result = self.claude.run_agent(
632	            agent_id="debugger",
633	            prompt=prompt,
634	            cwd=self.settings["target_repo"],
635	            stage="debugger",
636	            system_prompt=self._agent_identity("debugger"),
637	            max_tokens=remaining_tokens,
638	            event_callback=lambda event: self._record_agent_event(task, "debugger", "debugger", event),
639	        )
640	        transcript_path = self._write_transcript(task, "debugger", result)
641	        summary, verdict = self._summarize_result("debugger", result.output_text, result.verdict)
642	        artifacts = self._materialize_stage_artifacts(task, "debugger", summary, result.output_text, transcript_path)
643	        task["stages"]["debugger"].update({"status": "passed" if result.success else "failed", "summary": summary, "verdict": verdict, "ended_at": datetime.now().isoformat(), "artifact_paths": artifacts})
644	        self._persist_runtime()
645	        self._set_agent_status("debugger", "idle", None, "debugger", summary)
646	        context["debugger"] = {"summary": summary, "artifact_paths": artifacts}
647	        return result.success

649	    def _run_delivery_stage(self, task: Dict, context: Dict) -> bool:
650	        stage = "delivery"
651	        stage_state = task["stages"][stage]
652	        stage_state["status"] = "running"
653	        stage_state["started_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
654	        self._set_agent_status("delivery-manager", "running", task["id"], stage, "Preparing Gerrit delivery")
655	
656	        summary = "All quality gates passed. Preparing Gerrit submission."
657	        result = self.gerrit.submit_change(self.settings["target_repo"], task["id"], summary)
658	        task["gerrit"] = result
659	        artifact_path = os.path.join(task["run_dir"], "delivery", "delivery.md")
660	        report = [
661	            f"# Delivery Report - {task['title']}",
662	            "",
663	            f"Status: {result.get('status')}",
664	            f"Success: {result.get('success')}",
665	            "",
666	            "## Details",
667	            json.dumps(result, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False),
668	        ]
669	        self._save_text(artifact_path, "\n".join(report))
670	        stage_state["artifact_paths"] = [artifact_path]
671	        stage_state["summary"] = result.get("message") or result.get("status") or "Delivery prepared"
672	        stage_state["verdict"] = "PASS" if result.get("success") or result.get("status") in {"disabled", "unavailable"} else "FAIL"
673	        stage_state["status"] = "passed" if stage_state["verdict"] == "PASS" else "failed"
674	        stage_state["ended_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
675	        context[stage] = {"summary": stage_state["summary"], "artifact_paths": [artifact_path]}
676	        self._persist_runtime()
677	        self._write_run_metadata(task)
678	        self._set_agent_status("delivery-manager", "idle", None, stage, stage_state["summary"])
679	        self._emit("stage_completed", "Delivery stage finished", source="pipeline", task_id=task["id"], stage=stage, data=result)
680	        return stage_state["verdict"] == "PASS"

687	        self._set_agent_status("build-verifier", "running", task["id"], stage, "Running build verification")

693	        stage_state["verdict"] = "PASS" if result.get("success") else "FAIL"

700	        self._emit("stage_completed", "Build verification stage finished", source="pipeline", task_id=task["id"], stage=stage, data=result, level="success" if result.get("success") else "error")

703	    def _requires_manual_gate(self, task: Dict, stage: str) -> bool:
704	        if stage not in {"design", "delivery"}:

706	        text = task["request_text"].lower()
